## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [Contributing part of the README](README.md) and followed the process outlined there for submitting pull requests.
- [ ] My commit messages follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/en/v1.0.0/) format.
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] I have added necessary documentation (if appropriate).
